KARKORI CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED AND MOSTAFA KARKORI'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF ALL DISPUTES PER CONTRACT AND FOR STAY OF PROCEEDINGS AND OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO REMOVE MECHANIC'S LIEN IS GRANTED, EXCEPT AS TO MECHANIC'S LIEN.
